header.subtitle: Build one visual experiment and compare baseline demand, system response, regional deltas, and limits.

context_unavailable.title: Scenario context unavailable
context_unavailable.body: The public dashboard could not load a typed or legacy scenario context.

api_error.title: Scenario API error
api_error.body: The backend scenario run did not complete: {error}

partial_horizon.title: Partial scenario horizon
partial_horizon.body: The scenario API returned {count} baseline snapshot(s), fewer than the full 48-hour plus origin window.

loading.title: Running scenario
loading.body: The scenario API is calculating baseline deltas and response ranges.

cold_snap.label: Cold snap
cold_snap.detail: Heating-sensitive demand changes during the selected window.

generation_unavailability.label: Generating unit unavailable
generation_unavailability.detail: Available generation is reduced during the selected window.

ev_charging_shift.label: EV charging shift
ev_charging_shift.detail: Evening charging is moved into the overnight target window.

builder.title: Change -> System response -> Outcome
builder.copy: One active scenario is run at a time against the typed 48-hour scenario API.

validation.end_after_start: Scenario end time must be after start time.
validation.ev_windows_different: EV source and target charging windows must be different.
validation.ev_participation_positive: EV participation must be greater than zero.
validation.magnitude_positive: Scenario magnitude must be greater than zero.

peak_demand_change.label: Peak-demand change
peak_demand_change.detail: Scenario API P50 peak compared with baseline P50 peak.

minimum_balance_change.label: Minimum balance change
minimum_balance_change.detail: Change in the minimum modelled balance-context score.

import_export_range.label: Import/export range
import_export_range.detail: Estimated net import/export response across the horizon.

carbon_range.label: Carbon impact
carbon_range.detail: Estimated response-mix carbon range across the horizon.

timeline.title: 48-hour event window
timeline.note_title: Scenario block and baseline demand context

baseline.title: P50, uncertainty, delta area, and status transitions

residual_unresolved.label: Residual unresolved
residual_unresolved.detail: After estimated flexible generation and import/export response.

demand_delta.note_detail: Negative bars reduce demand in that hour; positive bars add demand in that hour.

generation.title: Estimated flexible generation, imports/exports, and unresolved residual

regional.title: Single delta map
regional.no_changed_regions: No regions have a demand delta in this scenario API result.

assumptions.sensitivity_body: This is an educational scenario estimate, not an operator dispatch forecast.

2.title: Heating demand rises
2.detail: Demand P50 is rerun for active hours

3.title: Residual load rises
3.detail: More demand remains after weather-sensitive supply

4.title: Flexible generation/imports respond
4.detail: Estimated response ranges absorb part of the residual

3.title: Residual load rises
3.detail: The same demand has less available supply

4.title: Flexible supply/imports respond
4.detail: Estimated response ranges absorb part of the residual

4.title: Peak may move
4.detail: Rebound hours are flagged by the scenario API

5.title: Carbon range changes
5.detail: Response-mix emissions are estimated as a range

baseline_scenario.scenario_hover:
%{x|%a %d %b %H:%M}
Scenario P50: %{y:,.0f} MW
Status: %{customdata[1]}
Demand delta: %{customdata[2]:+,.0f} MW
Import/export response: %{customdata[3]:+,.0f} MW

api_text.generation_unavailability_regional_reaso: Generating-unit unavailability is represented as national supply availability only in v1.
api_text.regional_delta_method: Regional demand deltas are allocated from the reconciled regional demand shares; this is not regional adequacy.
api_text.regional_delta_unavailable: Regional scenario demand-delta data is unavailable.
api_text.national_supply_only: This scenario changes national supply context only.
api_text.no_regional_allocation: This scenario type has no regional demand allocation in v1.
api_text.import_export_method: After flexible generation response, a configured fraction of the remaining residual is represented as higher net imports, lower exports, lower net imports, or higher exports.
api_text.generation_response_method: Flexible generation absorbs a configured portion of residual change; wind and solar follow baseline forecasts.
api_text.carbon_method: Each positive residual MWh is multiplied by a plausible response-mix intensity range; each negative residual MWh is treated as avoided response-mix output.
api_text.caveat_directional: This is a directional public-decision scenario, not an operator dispatch forecast.
api_text.caveat_ranges: Imports, exports, flexible generation, and unresolved residual are represented as ranges to avoid false precision.
api_text.caveat_import_requirement: The engine does not make import requirement automatically equal to peak-demand change.
api_text.caveat_carbon: Carbon is a plausible response-mix range, not verified emissions accounting.
api_text.assumption_wind_solar: Wind and solar follow their baseline adjusted forecasts.
api_text.assumption_nuclear: Nuclear follows availability context; generating-unit unavailability reduces available supply, not demand.
api_text.assumption_cold_snap: Cold-snap demand rerun uses heating_sensitivity_mw_per_c and deterministic local-hour multipliers.
api_text.assumption_ev_shift: EV charging shift conserves total modelled scenario energy across complete source and target windows.
api_text.assumption_generation_fraction: Flexible generation response fraction range: {fraction} of residual change.
api_text.assumption_import_fraction: Import/export response fraction range after flexible response: {fraction}.
api_text.request_assumptions: Request assumptions: interface {interface}; estimate {estimate}; single active scenario: {single_active}.
